name: Varunprasaath R. Selvaraju, Ph.D.
summary: PhD Chemist with 6+ years of experience in materials characterization, failure analysis, and process development. Expertise in FT-IR, UV-Vis, thermal analysis (TGA, DSC), and materials testing for manufacturing applications. Strong background in structure-property relationships, root cause analysis, and supporting manufacturing process development. Experienced in multi-technique characterization and statistical analysis for materials optimization.

education.degree: B.S. (Research), Major: Chemistry; Minor: Materials Science

bullets: Identified failure modes and performed root cause analysis on functional materials using multi-technique characterization.
Developed stress test protocols and characterized materials using FT-IR, UV-Vis, TGA, and DSC.
Supported process development through materials characterization and data interpretation.

skills.Materials Analysis: FT-IR, UV-Vis, TGA, DSC, ellipsometry, NMR, GPC
skills.Failure & Process: Failure analysis, root cause analysis, process development, DOE, SPC
